author: y4rr
content: Audit follow-up #4/5 optim-C1 (#695) APPROVE — opus 4.7 closed the NumCast unwrap migration in optim's top-5 highest-density files (rmsprop, sgd, adamw, adam, adagrad). 62 of 66 sites migrated to ferrotorch_core::numeric_cast::cast<>?; 4 sites honestly flagged as trait-blocked (Optimizer::state_dict returns OptimizerState directly; migrating requires workspace-coordination trait change). 0 function signatures changed (all migration sites already lived in FerrotorchResult-returning frames). Discipline highlight: subagent could have silently changed the Optimizer trait under the NumCast-cleanup banner; instead they surfaced it as a separate Step 4 coordination event. Filed #696 for the trait migration. Optim-A protections verified UNCHANGED (FERROTORCH_ENABLE_GPU_FALLBACK at adam.rs:396, Arc-aliasing SAFETY, slice::from_raw_parts SAFETY, .expect-restructure region). Optim-B SAFETY comments UNCHANGED. *Config #[non_exhaustive] attributes UNCHANGED. ParamGroup encapsulation UNCHANGED. cargo build --workspace PASS, 322/322 optim tests PASS, fmt clean. Architect-mode running tally: 12 dispatches, 10 clean APPROVEs (mps, distributions, item 8 with 1 redirect, core-2a, core-2b, vision-A, vision-B, optim-A round 2, optim-B, optim-C1), 2 truncations resolved via continuation (core-1, optim-A-1). Crates done: 1/5 mps, 2/5 core, 3/5 vision, 4/5 optim — A/B/C1 done; C2 remaining is the bottom-18 files (48 sites). Next: optim-C2, then crate 5/5 (llama).
